# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port:
    name: http
    number: 80

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: frontend
  serverNames:
  - frontend-server.default.svc.cluster.local

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port:
    name: http
    number: 8080

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: backend
  serverNames:
  - backend-server.default.svc.cluster.local

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: backend
  serverNames:
  - backend-server.default.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - sourceNamespaces:
      - default
    to:
    - operation:
        ports:
        - 8080

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-frontend-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: frontend
  serverNames:
  - frontend-server.default.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - sourceNamespaces:
      - default
    to:
    - operation:
        ports:
        - 80

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-account-frontend-to-backend
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: backend
  serverNames:
  - backend-server.default.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - sourceServiceAccounts:
      - frontend-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        ports:
        - 8080

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-account-backend-to-frontend
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: frontend
  serverNames:
  - frontend-server.default.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - sourceServiceAccounts:
      - backend-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        ports:
        - 80
